channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Greenwich council bin men leaving a mess, 20th July
item.description:
This mess has been left on the 20th July by the bin collectors, this needs investigation and a clean up.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawthorne Crescent, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish still there, 20th July
item.description:
Health hazard still there and was not cleared or fixed as recently reported.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Hearns Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s 189, 20th July
item.description:
Glass panels, large big items, heavy plastic, old heavy curtain rail o/s 189 (on bembridge close)
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Broken fence by cars, 20th July
item.description:
Fences is broken and falling more due to children now using trolly to climb up and climb alone the wall, this is dangerous for the children and for damage to cars. The children are also playing with rubbish that’s been thrown behind the fence that they are now able to get to and rubbish that’s has been dumped in the bushes. This area needs to be cleaned up and repaired

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Poppy Close, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip top ceres Road, 20th July
item.description:
Fly tip needs collecting please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Nicholas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At tree on corner of Streatley and burton Road, 20th July
item.description:
A broken chair has been left at the tree

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Streatley Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Litter around bexleyheath station, 20th July
item.description:
Lots of cans bottles general litter around station approach and exit side of station. Not sure if this bexley council or south eastern? Litter in kerbs etc. also in Percy road. I picked up lots myself this morning but all the was long Percy Road. A council Pole advising parking has been knocked down laying near the bins on the pavement near the the side of coop and Jacqueline jossa academy.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, West Heath, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inadequate street cleaning, commercial waste and recurring fly infestation outside 54 Green Lanes, N16 9NH, 20th July
item.description:
Formal complaint: poor street cleaning and commercial waste near 54 Green Lanes are causing a severe fly problem. Up to 30 black and green flies enter my flat within an hour. Please inspect the area urgently, improve cleaning and address the source.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal camping, tent pitched in woods close to bowls club, 20th July
item.description:
Tent pitched a few days ago in Lower Marvels Wood close to Duke of Kent Court Bowls Club
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground gate needs re-spring closure, 20th July
item.description:
The gate spring closure needs replacing in children's play area. They can easily escape

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lownds Court, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees blocking pavement, 20th July
item.description:
And in residents garden need to be cut as blocking areas including pavement. Outside Moffatt House.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Redcar Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped in the verge, 20th July
item.description:
Old soiled mattress dumped left side of Central Way heading towards Twin Tumps Shopping Centre has been there for months.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Central Way, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush's, brambles, 20th July
item.description:
Bush's and brambles are over grown on the road to the car park. Last 2 times i used the road the car get badly scratched. Also the crossing from Mountview road into the park, via the zebra crossing is not easily visible and the crossing needs re-painting. This situation has got progressively worse over the last few weeks. Some brambles have very thick branches, like 20cm thick! Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mountview Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 wheelie bins, 20th July
item.description:
There is 2 big wheelie bins left outside and the stink like something has died in them
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beddington Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked illegally & dangerously, 20th July
item.description:
EN25 WZP silver bmw parked on double yellow lines within 10 metres of busy traffic light junction on Canada St/Surrey Quays Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Canada Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Litter and large bag

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keswick Road, Crofton, Greater London

item.title: Priory Gardens Depot Entrance, High Street, Orpington, BR6 0JF, 20th July
item.description:
